packets.approvalRequestCommand: npm run ariadne -- approval-request --project ariadne --by <operator> --target github --action "Enable one reviewed GitHub mutation adapter action" --risk medium --reason "Permit a bounded PR or workflow operation after checks, review, and branch policy are verified" --rollback "Document how to revert or undo the PR/workflow operation and restore manual review flow." --evidence <auth-or-policy-evidence>
requiredEvidence: repository, PR, branch policy, and check-rollup evidence
packets.mutationPlanCommand: Create or repair the target-specific mutation-readiness plan after operator approval exists. npm run ariadne -- github-mutation-plan --project <project> --repo <owner/name> --action <merge-pr|rerun-failed-run> --auth-evidence <paths> --approval <approval-id>
packets.dryRunCommand: After mutation-readiness-github-2026-05-16T16-50-54-241Z passes audit, run npm run ariadne -- mutation-dry-run --project <project> --plan mutation-readiness-github-2026-05-16T16-50-54-241Z
packets.executionCommand: Run a passed dry-run for an audit-passed plan first.
packets.rollbackRequirement: Document how to revert or undo the PR/workflow operation and restore manual review flow.
packets.postVerificationRequirement: Verify PR/workflow status, check rollup, and repository state after execution.
